title: High Court Bail Docket IN-BAIL-2023-0911
summary: Akshay @ Vasu was accused along with co-accused Siddhant @ Sonu of forcibly entering the victim's house, assaulting her with a stick, and robbing jewellery and cash worth ₹1–1.5 lakhs. CCTV footage placed the accused near the crime scene, but no recovery was made from Akshay.
